scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/classroom run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/classroom run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run typecheck
